query: UPDATE blog_articles SET contentHtml = REPLACE(contentHtml, 'https://www.lcjmall.com', 'https://lcjmall.com') WHERE contentHtml LIKE '%www.lcjmall.com%';
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway03.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user ViCMbGRGvoSuVwV.root --database GgA9WvTBCZMf6mjyMMwACw --execute UPDATE blog_articles SET contentHtml = REPLACE(contentHtml, 'https://www.lcjmall.com', 'https://lcjmall.com') WHERE contentHtml LIKE '%www.lcjmall.com%';
